strings.cancel_message: No problem. You can reach us anytime at support@traveldesk.example.com.
strings.ticket_created: I've prepared your case with all the details from our conversation. The agent will have full context — you won't need to repeat anything.
strings.transfer_success: Connecting you now. They have your full conversation history and all relevant booking details. Thank you for your patience!
strings.offer_callback_prompt: Would you like us to call you back? (yes/no)
strings.no_agents: I wasn't able to connect you with a live agent right now.
strings.connected: You're now connected. Have a great conversation!
strings.callback_set: Callback is set. We'll be in touch!
strings.cancelled: Understood. Feel free to reach out anytime.
